list.name: 更改
list.comment: 全面实现android和桌面端的互通逻辑，并且修改了聊天历史存储逻辑

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Android App.CharRoom.executor": "Run", "Android App.androidApp.executor": "Run", "Android App.qingliao.CharRoom.androidApp.executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [:androidApp:build].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [:androidApp:clean].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [:androidApp:compileDebugAndroidTestSources].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [build].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [checkRuntime].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [clean].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [customApk].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [customJar].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [dependencies].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [packageReleaseMsi].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [package].executor": "Run", "Gradle.CharRoom [proguardReleaseJars].executor": "Run", "Gradle.desktop.executor": "Run", "Gradle.下载源代码.executor": "Run", "Gradle.升级 Gradle 包装器.executor": "Run", "JAR 应用程序.CharRoom-desktop-1.0-SNAPSHOT.jar.executor": "Run", "JAR 应用程序.在线聊天App-1.0.0.jar.executor": "Run", "Kotlin.ChatKt.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.formatter.settings.were.checked": "true", "RunOnceActivity.go.migrated.go.modules.settings": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "android.gradle.sync.needed": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "external.system.has.shared.sources": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "go.import.settings.migrated": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "D:/lora/qingliao/CharRoom/src/desktopMain/resources/icons", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "project.structure.last.edited": "项目", "project.structure.proportion": "0.17", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "reference.settings.ide.settings.notifications", "ts.external.directory.path": "D:\\Program Files\\JetBrains\\IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate\\plugins\\javascript-plugin\\jsLanguageServicesImpl\\external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "mongo", "mysql", "redis" ] } }

item.itemvalue: JAR 应用程序.在线聊天App-1.0.0.jar
JAR 应用程序.在线聊天App-1.0.0.jar

task.summary: 完成发送逻辑 修正重发图标逻辑
请求调用封装 进行分包整理
新增拉取离线消息操作
修复了因为Chat阻塞软件不能动的bug
修改群聊的消息体部分字段名
新增读取私有服务器地址的功能
修复离线消息拉取字段不匹配问题
统一后端处理逻辑，并增加统一提示组件
完成安卓客户端基本框架
基本完成app逻辑和界面构建
全面实现android和桌面端的互通逻辑，并且修改了聊天历史存储逻辑

MESSAGE.value: 请求调用封装 进行分包整理
新增拉取离线消息操作
修复了因为Chat阻塞软件不能动的bug
修改群聊的消息体部分字段名
新增读取私有服务器地址的功能
修复离线消息拉取字段不匹配问题
统一后端处理逻辑，并增加统一提示组件
完成安卓客户端基本框架
基本完成app逻辑和界面构建
全面实现android和桌面端的互通逻辑，并且修改了聊天历史存储逻辑

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: 全面实现android和桌面端的互通逻辑，并且修改了聊天历史存储逻辑
